name: schedule_reminder
description: Schedule a time-based reminder for the user. Accepts natural-language time expressions ('in 2 days', 'next Monday at 10am', 'tomorrow morning') or ISO timestamps. The reminder is delivered as a NIP-17 DM at the specified time. Optional recurrence: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly'. Returns the scheduled trigger_at timestamp so the agent can confirm the exact time to the user.

message.description: The reminder message to deliver (1–500 chars). Write in second person so it reads naturally as a DM: 'Call Charlie', 'Submit Q2 report', etc.

trigger_expression.description: When to fire the reminder. Accepts natural language ('in 2 days', 'next Monday at 10am', 'tomorrow morning at 9', 'in 30 minutes') or an ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC). Relative expressions are resolved against the current UTC time.

user_id.description: User ID for whom to create the reminder. Always pass the user_id from the session context.

user_timezone.description: User's IANA timezone for display purposes (e.g. 'Europe/Warsaw'). Defaults to 'UTC' if not provided.

reminder_id.description: UUID of the created reminder row.

trigger_at.description: UTC ISO timestamp when the reminder will fire.

trigger_at_local.description: Trigger time formatted in the user's timezone for confirmation.
